description: You are a DevOps Engineer responsible for a multi-tier production infrastructure. Your team requires a unified monitoring dashboard that shows all infrastructure tiers simultaneously so on-call engineers can quickly identify which tier is responsible for any degradation. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Infrastructure Health' containing four graphs: 'EC2 Compute Tier' using CPU utilization metrics from the servers.ec2_instance_* namespace; 'Database Tier' using the servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization metric; 'Load Balancer Tier' using the derivative() function on the servers.load_balancer.requests.count metric to show the request rate; and 'Storage Tier' using disk write bytes metrics from the servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes namespace. Save the dashboard.
